demographic_audit_note: Audited Atlantis demographics against facility face sheet; corrected a typo in the ZIP code (18104) and verified Medicare Advantage eligibility for the spinal fusion recovery program. Home address and primary phone for wife (caregiver) are now accurate in the queue.
home_vs_ltc_determination: Social Worker confirmed the discharge goal is Home with Home Health Agency (HHA) support rather than Long-Term Care, contingent on caregiver readiness.
weekly_facility_update: Week 2 Check-in: Patient is meeting PT goals for mobility post-spinal fusion, but the wife is exhibiting high anxiety regarding the home layout and brace management. SW is monitoring caregiver stress levels.
v_card_and_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into the patient's smartphone and program flyer delivered to the wife during the bedside education session on Day 5.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: Completed 24-hour pulse call. Reached the wife who was in a state of 'Caregiver Panic,' threatening to refuse discharge because she felt the HHA wouldn't arrive fast enough. PN de-escalated by confirming the scheduled MA visit and providing the physical appointment card details.
atlantis_final_sync: Discharge date of 11/14 and first visit date of 11/15 have been synced in Atlantis. Success metric tracked.
ma_visit_booking: Medical Assistant visit is confirmed and scheduled for 11/15 at 09:00 AM, which is 19 hours post-discharge, meeting the 24-hour incentive window.
narrative_summary: The patient, a 70-year-old male recovering from spinal fusion, was identified in Atlantis with a primary goal of returning home. During the maintenance phase, significant friction emerged via 'Caregiver Panic' from the wife, which was addressed through proactive education on the transition timeline and the delivery of a physical appointment card. By coordinating the MA visit within 24 hours of the confirmed discharge date and syncing all data in Atlantis, the PN secured a safe transition and triggered the first visit incentive.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Caregiver Panic: Wife expresses fear of managing spinal brace and mobility at home.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: Caregiver Panic: Wife expresses fear of managing spinal brace and mobility at home.

format_1_state_log.event_description: 24-Hour Pulse Call de-escalation regarding HHA arrival window.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: 24-Hour Pulse Call de-escalation regarding HHA arrival window.

format_2_triples.situation: Wife is overwhelmed by post-surgical care instructions provided by the facility.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Walked the family through Day 1 expectations: who arrives, what equipment is needed, and the MA's role in the first 24 hours.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Educating on program expectations: Walked the family through Day 1 expectations: who arrives, what equipment is needed, and the MA's role in the first 24 hours.

format_2_triples.situation: Wife threatens to refuse discharge due to anxiety about the 48-hour HHA intake window.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Escalated the volatile family situation to the Social Worker to ensure clinical alignment on discharge readiness.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Escalating to SW for resolution: Escalated the volatile family situation to the Social Worker to ensure clinical alignment on discharge readiness.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis queue shows a missing secondary contact number for the patient's residence.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Audited the facility face sheet and updated Atlantis demographics to ensure the home team could reach the family.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Audited the facility face sheet and updated Atlantis demographics to ensure the home team could reach the family.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Step back and allow the Social Worker to lead the family meeting regarding the wife's refusal to accept the discharge date.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW boundary as the primary lead for discharge planning and family mediation when refusal is threatened.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Conduct a 24-hour pre-discharge pulse call to confirm home readiness and provide the wife with a physical appointment card for the MA visit.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Follows the Stage 3 checklist to reduce caregiver anxiety through concrete scheduling and expectations.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Suggest a different HHA agency to the Social Worker that has a faster intake turnaround to appease the wife's timeline.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Directly violates the SW boundary by suggesting alternative HHA agencies and interfering with the referral process.
